about.title: About bettaHVAC
about.description: With years of experience, bettaHVAC provides top-tier heating, ventilation, and air conditioning services. We are dedicated to delivering reliable, efficient, and cost-effective comfort solutions.

services.title: Heating Installation

services.title: Preventative Maintenance
services.description: Regular maintenance to extend the life of your equipment and save on energy costs.

reviews.author: Jane Doe
reviews.text: Excellent service! The technicians were prompt, professional, and had our A/C running perfectly in no time.

offers.title: Free Inspection

faqs.question: How often should I service my HVAC equipment?
faqs.answer: We recommend scheduling preventative maintenance at least twice a year: once in the spring for the air conditioning and once in the fall for the heating.

faqs.question: Do you offer 24/7 emergency service?
faqs.answer: Yes, our team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to handle any emergency in Lexington and surrounding areas.

faqs.question: How long does it take to install a new air conditioning system?
faqs.answer: Generally, a standard installation takes one business day (8 to 10 hours). However, the time may vary depending on the complexity of the system and necessary modifications.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you install?
faqs.answer: We work with the leading and best brands on the market, guaranteeing quality, energy efficiency, and durability in all our installations.
